justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as June 3rd and then expanded the search to June 4th and 5th when the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots on the following days when the initial request was unavailable, and then re-offered them when the user asked for more options on the original day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and provided relevant options without any unnecessary turns or redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent seamlessly handled the unavailability of the initial request by offering suitable alternatives and then re-presenting them when the user asked for further options on the original day, demonstrating full context retention.
